name: Granite 4.1 8B Instruct
note: Successor to the Granite 4.0-H-Small MoE already in the corpus (dated 2025-10-02); IBM says the new 8B dense model matches or beats that prior 32B MoE flagship at 4x fewer parameters. Released alongside 3B and 30B siblings plus updated speech/vision/embedding/Guardian models.
verificationNotes: IBM's own materials describe the 8B as matching/beating Granite 4.0-H-Small qualitatively and 'competitive' on instruction-following/tool-calling vs Gemma/Qwen, without a specific numeric benchmark table in the sources checked; no results entry included to avoid guessing a number.
